dental.name: Sunrise Dental Practice
dental.insurance: We accept most PPO plans including Delta Dental, Cigna, Aetna, and MetLife. Payment plans available.
dental.new_patient: Please bring a valid photo ID, insurance card, and list of current medications. Arrive 15 minutes early to complete paperwork.

faq.how to book: Call us at (512) 555-0101 or book online. Same-day emergency slots available.
faq.cancellation: Please cancel at least 24 hours in advance to avoid a $50 fee.
faq.parking: Free parking in the building garage on 2nd and 3rd floors.
faq.kids: We see patients of all ages from 3 years and up.

gp.name: Westside Family Clinic
gp.insurance: We accept Medicare, Medicaid, and most major PPO/HMO plans. Sliding scale fees for uninsured patients.
gp.new_patient: Bring photo ID, insurance card, medication list, and prior medical records if available. New patient forms can be completed online.

faq.prescription refills: Submit refill requests via the patient portal or call 48 hours before you run out. We do not refill controlled substances by phone.
faq.lab results: Results are available in the patient portal within 3–5 business days.
faq.referrals: Referrals are processed within 2 business days and sent directly to the specialist.
faq.telehealth: Video visits available Mon–Thu for non-urgent concerns. Book through the portal.

physio.name: ActiveEdge Physiotherapy
physio.insurance: We direct-bill most major insurers. Workers' compensation and motor vehicle accident claims accepted.
physio.new_patient: Wear comfortable clothing. Bring any imaging (X-rays, MRI reports) and your referral letter if applicable. Assessment takes 60 minutes.

faq.how many sessions: Depends on your condition. Your physio will outline a plan at the first session — typically 4–12 sessions.
faq.what to expect: Initial session includes full assessment. Subsequent sessions are 30–45 minutes of targeted treatment.
faq.home exercises: Your physio will provide a customised program. Do not follow generic exercises before your assessment.
faq.cancellation: 24-hour notice required. Late cancellations incur a $40 fee.

pediatric.name: Sunshine Pediatric Clinic
pediatric.insurance: We accept CHIP, Medicaid, and all major private insurance plans.
pediatric.new_patient: Bring the child's immunisation records, insurance card, and a photo ID for the parent or guardian. Our new patient packet can be completed online.

faq.vaccines: We follow the full CDC immunisation schedule. We do not accept vaccine-hesitant families as it puts other patients at risk.
faq.sick visits: Same-day sick appointments available Mon–Fri. Call at 8 AM for the day's slots.
faq.fever guidelines: Infants under 3 months with any fever (≥100.4°F) should go to the ER immediately. Older children: call us if over 104°F or lasting more than 3 days.
faq.after hours: Our after-hours nurse line is available 5 PM – 10 PM Mon–Fri and 12 PM – 6 PM weekends.
